motion.name: ease-liquid
motion.purpose: Standard easing for all fluid transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action with Indigo Pulse gradient.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6366f1, #8b5cf6); color: white; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 10px; font-weight: 600; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.4); filter: brightness(1.1); }

components.name: Glass Card
components.html:
Card Title
Content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.7); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-radius: 16px; backdrop-filter: blur(20px); overflow: hidden; transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-card:hover { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); transform: scale(1.005); } .ds-card-header { padding: 16px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; color: #f1f5f9; } .ds-card-body { padding: 20px; color: #94a3b8; font-size: 14px; }

narrative.overview: JobPilot AI is a premium automation suite that blends technical precision with organic fluidity. The system prioritizes 'Kinetic Clarity'—where every transition and state change feels intentional, smooth, and liquid.
keyCharacteristics: Information Elegance: High data density with strict hierarchy.

rules.name: The Glass Scarcity Rule
rules.body: Glass surfaces must be rare and purposeful.

rules.name: The Semantic Weight Rule
rules.body: Use font weight rather than color to create hierarchy.

dos: Do use OKLCH for color derivations.
Do use exponential easing for transitions.
Do tint neutrals toward the primary indigo hue.
donts: Don't use border-left/right stripes as accents.
Don't use pure black or pure white.
Don't use emojis for primary navigation.
